description_long: This airplane features a futuristic, angular design with a predominantly dark gray body accented by green and blue highlights. The wings are sharply swept back and integrated into the main fuselage, giving it a stealthy, aggressive appearance. The aircraft has a low-profile, twin-boom structure with pronounced, blade-like extensions and a streamlined canopy at the front. The engines are mounted above the main fuselage, with visible intakes and exhausts, suggesting a high-performance jet propulsion system. The tail section is split, with twin vertical stabilizers and no conventional horizontal stabilizer, contributing to its advanced look. The surface finish is sleek and metallic, with reflective qualities and minimal visible seams or rivets.
description: A sleek, futuristic gray airplane with swept-back wings, green and blue accents, and a twin-boom, split-tail design. The engines are mounted above the fuselage, and the surface is smooth and metallic.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, angular canopy, and aggressive, blade-like wing extensions.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the swept-back wings, elevated engine nacelles, and the split tail structure.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the twin vertical stabilizers, wide wingspan, and the open exhausts of the engines.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the engine placement, wing sweep, and the streamlined body profile.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept wings with integrated winglets and pronounced anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted above the main fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with a split tail configuration, no conventional horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear, main and nose gear not visibly extended.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a streamlined canopy.
